titleProfile: Senior Backend Engineer · Tech Lead · Distributed Architecture
profileSummary: Tech Lead with over 11 years of experience in the .NET ecosystem, designing and evolving distributed systems in financial and enterprise sectors. Experience leading approximately 10 technical squads (40–60 developers) and architectures comprising more than 10 microservices in high-availability environments.
profileSummary2: I have driven initiatives that reduced production incidents by 35%, improved database performance by 30–35%, and optimized deployment times by 50% through architectural standardization and DevOps automation.

exp1B4: Introduced fault-tolerance patterns reducing production errors by 35%.
